notes: Lane graph. Travel distance is no longer a straight line: a seeded map of hazard-stretched routes and cheap hyperlane shortcuts now underlies every world's fuel cost, different every game. Travel itself is unchanged - still a direct jump - but some far worlds are now surprisingly cheap to reach via a hyperlane (marked with a 🛰️ pill), and some nearby ones cost more than the map suggests thanks to a rough stretch along the way.
